subject: Remove unused properties from config files
commit_message:
Remove unused properties from config files

DB and auth credentials are never extracted from this file thus it's
better to remove them to avoid confusion.

Issue-ID: OOM-2051
Signed-off-by: Krzysztof Opasiak <k.opasiak@samsung.com>
Change-Id: I66b0cb61b17439496ed0e0c8d9529ad730823d61

entries.message:

Patch Set 1:

the staging branch is not used anymore? if so, the we can abandon this gerrit.

So using directly master is "allowed" ;)

staging branch is no longer in use
